# Project-Local Agents

These are the reusable project-local continuation agents copied into new project roots by the hybrid canonical starter package.

## Agents

- `project-e2e-planning-architect.agent.md`
- `project-strict-executor.agent.md`
- `project-quality-enforcer-v2.agent.md`

## Purpose

- keep canonical planning inside the project root
- keep execution tied to the project's own documentation system
- keep quality enforcement reusable across projects without Growrix-specific naming
